title: Ravenbrooks Extended Cr
description: An addon of Ravenbrooks Cr - Hello Neigbor made by Richard_Burusa
body:
Ravenbrooks Extension is an Extention to [Ravenbrooks Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ravenbrooks.c-hello-neighbor) by [Richard_Burusa](https://modrinth.com/user/Richard_Burusa), you should also download his mod, it's amazing. 

This mod goes by the artstyle of Alpha 3 to the Full Game of Hello Neighbor.


Credits: the Keys and Locks were made by Richard_Burusa (he did help me with this mod)


  
- Anything in the Mod:

Yeah there's a few things in the mod (there's also a wallpaper of search & rescue as an experiment)


- WARNING: This is my second mod, my first mod is MysticalCraft (Which is not public on Modrinth) so, there might be some bugs along the way.

I hope you all enjoy this mod, if you found any bugs or whatsoever then contact me on my discord.
